name: Alton Richardson Studios | Boulder Wedding Photographer

reviews.text:
Planning a wedding was one of the most stressful things I have ever done in my life. However, I can say with great confidence that having Alton as our photographer made our wedding experience so much easier, lovelier and more memorable than I could have ever imagined.
I was firstly so impressed by his professionalism and attention to detail during the planning process— but the greatest part about working with Alton was how he arrived on our wedding day and immediately jumped into action. I was feeling extremely stressed and overwhelmed and said “I don’t know what is photogenic about this at all”, but he told me not to worry. Alton knew exactly what kind of direction was going to gently guide us to the best experience and most beautiful photos possible. Nothing ever felt awkward or out of place; we simply lived and laughed all day and got incredible photos out of it. Every single person in my wedding party remarked on how wonderful our photographer was, and how he was able to guide and prompt us into these stunning photo ops, but never felt stiff or rushed or pushed into anything we didn’t want to do. I couldn’t have imagined a better energy to invite into our lives on a stressful day like that.
We recently got our full gallery back, and I could NOT be more thrilled. I would recommend Alton to anyone!

Alton took our wedding pictures in May 2025, and he was amazing! Him and his associate where so much fund to work with, and our family had wonderful interactions with him during the wedding. We aren’t usually big picture takers, but taking our portrait shots turned out being one of the most enjoyable parts of the wedding day! Alton is very professional and such a joy to work with. Not to mention, the pictures are beautiful! We could’t have picked a better photographer, and we have already been raving about  him to all of our friends!

Alton is our wedding photographer, but he also did our engagement shoot. Once we saw the engagement pictures we were blown away by his talent, creativity and stunning eye. He is a pleasure to work with and we are counting down the days to our wedding. We are so excited to see what he does!

He was so kind to us and was willing to make wiggle room for timing so we could get the perfect spot before the crowd of people came. He listened to every idea I was looking for with our photos and created the most beautiful photos we will cherish these forever. The quality of our photos are exceptional and I have already started recommending anyone who’s looking to find a photographer to use Alton he is wonderful!!!

Alton did both our engagement photos and our wedding photos. He is such a talented photographer. Neither of use are what we would describe as photogenic and he did such an amazing job of putting us at ease. The photos turned out great with his coaching and getting us to chill. We didn't have ideas for where we wanted to do out photo shoots and he handled everything. It was so nice to put our trust in him and have everything turn out so much more beautifully than I ever could have hoped for.

More than just his fantastic eye for his craft, Alton is a truly exceptional person. Even though we spent just a few hours together, I feel like we all built up such a great rapport. I was asked by so many wedding guests how long we have been friends :)

If you're in the market for an engagement or wedding photographer, you can stop the search. Alton is the best.
